target.title: investigate(memory-core): root-cause for #84882 dreaming silent daily-file deletion
target.body:
## Claiming this issue

Placeholder PR to register intent before starting work — no code yet, will push commits as investigation/fix lands.

## Scope

Root-cause investigation for #84882: `memory-core` Dreaming pipeline silently deletes daily memory files (`memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`). Two confirmed incidents (May 19-20, May 30) per issue thread, mechanism still unknown.

#94537 already landed atomic-write + dangling-ref cleanup as defense-in-depth, but explicitly does not identify the deletion mechanism. This PR targets finding and fixing the actual root cause (suspect: `normalized recall artifacts before dreaming` step, same code path implicated in prior bug #64068).

Will update with findings + fix. Converting from draft once real-behavior proof is ready.
